name: Magi Magi ☆ Magician Gal
name_jp: マジマジ☆マジシャンギャル
desc:
2 Level 6 Spellcaster monsters
Once per turn: You can detach 1 material from this card and banish 1 card from your hand, then activate 1 of these effects;
● Target 1 monster your opponent controls; take control of it until the End Phase.
● Target 1 monster in your opponent's GY; Special Summon it.
mnst_eff:
2 Level 6 Spellcaster monsters
Once per turn: You can detach 1 material from this card and banish 1 card from your hand, then activate 1 of these effects;
● Target 1 monster your opponent controls; take control of it until the End Phase.
● Target 1 monster in your opponent's GY; Special Summon it.
eff:

jp_sets.set: Weekly Shōnen Jump 2012, Issue 2 promotional card

action: Takes control of an opponent's monster
summoning: Special Summons from your opponent's Graveyard to your field
